name: Agent sessions are capped at 100 drachma unless explicitly raised
description: An agent session must not spend more than 100 drachma in inference, tool-call, or external API costs without explicit authorization from the principal. Sessions that reach the cap are paused and must request continuation.

policy.rationale: Unbounded agent spend is a runaway cost risk. A 100-drachma default cap ensures agents pause and ask before escalating spend, giving the principal an opportunity to reconsider scope.
